text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: MMLEADS │ August 2021 │ V 1.0 111 

MDCR_TOTAL_FFS_SPEND 

LABEL: Medicare FFS Payment Amount — Total 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the total Medicare payment amount for all Medicare fee-for-service (FFS) claims and 
Part D events (PDEs) for the beneficiary during the year. Note that only fee-for-service (FFS) claims for 
services and PDEs are included. 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: Medicare Claims Files (derived) 

VALUES: $ 

COMMENT: CCW
